//: react-app preset for the devkit governance gate-engine. Copy to your repo ROOT. JSON has no real comments, so guidance lives in //-prefixed sibling keys — strip them or leave them (the loader ignores unknown keys). Every path resolves relative to the consumer repo, never the devkit package.
//scanRoots: Where the ratchets + scans look for impl files. Default ['src'] suits a standard Vite/CRA app. If your app lives under a non-standard root (e.g. a monorepo package at services/webapp/src), OVERRIDE this — set scanRoots to that path.
//boundaries: Cross-trust-boundary prefixes for the decisions smell gate. A plain React app has no trust boundary, so this is EMPTY (the smell never fires on a single-process frontend). Add prefixes only if you grow a backend in-repo.
//fanoutCap: Max non-test impl files per folder (any depth) before guard-fanout trips. This — NOT eslint — governs fan-out for the react-app preset.
//fanoutExempt: Flat-by-design folders exempt from the fanout cap. EMPTY by default; add a folder only when its flatness is intentional (e.g. an icon set).
//decisionsDir: Append-only decision-log dir (guard-decisions CLI + smell gate target).
//sourceExtensions: Impl-file extensions the ratchets + structure rule count. A React app is ['ts','tsx'].
//maxLines: Raw line cap per source file (guard-size ratchet enforces it; existing giants grandfathered shrink-only). Replaces the old eslint max-lines rule so eslint stays structure-only. Per-FUNCTION caps need a parser — not yet.
//review: Topology the 5 reviewer subagents read. backendRoots/frontendRoots = path prefixes per reviewer (frontend reviewers exit early when frontendRoots is empty). trustBoundaries = optional prose describing your client/server split. shortcutTracking = enable the tracked-story rule. accessibility.skipTouchTargets = opt out of the 44px WCAG touch-target check (e.g. a desktop-only app).
//structure: THE topology (data). The shared eslint.config.mjs shim compiles this via devkit's engine — no per-stack eslint rule. Governs src/components + src/pages as trees of PascalCase folders (index.tsx + colocated subcomponents/hooks/helpers/tests/css/md); every OTHER src/ folder (services/, store/, hooks/, …) is ungoverned/open (no tree = not visited). To govern another folder, add a tree here. Walls empty (a plain app has no trust boundary).
